nodes.label: Regression tests for issue #1560 — Settings password silently no-ops when HERMES
Acceptance criterion: GET /api/settings includes `password_env_var: true`     wh
Control case: env var unset → password_env_var:false (falsy).
Whitespace-only env var must NOT shadow settings — matches the strip()     guard
Helper: POST a JSON body to /api/settings via handle_post.
Acceptance criterion: POST `_set_password` returns 409 when env var is set,
Acceptance criterion: env var set + POST `_set_password` → 409 +     settings.js
Control case: env var unset → POST _set_password is NOT a 409.      We don't pin
index.html must include the lock-banner div with i18n key, hidden by     default
panels.js loadSettingsPanel must read settings.password_env_var and     disable
panels.js must hide the Disable Auth button when env-var-locked — its     POST w
The locked-state input placeholder must come from the i18n key —     matches the
Return the slice of i18n.js between `<key>: {` and the next top-level     locale
The lock-banner translation key must exist in every shipped locale —     otherwi
The locked-input placeholder translation key must exist in every shipped     loc
